name: should create a keeptradecut query
description: Test case for should create a keeptradecut query
expected_query: with "te7e49e0e691e0de6ad53db9d2498b3b1" as materialized (select COALESCE(trg_pid) as pid, SUM(CASE WHEN comp = true THEN recv_yds ELSE 0 END) as rec_yds_from_plays from "nfl_plays" inner join "player_seasonlogs" on ("nfl_plays"."trg_pid" = "player_seasonlogs"."pid") and "nfl_plays"."year" = "player_seasonlogs"."year" and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" = "player_seasonlogs"."seas_type" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "player_seasonlogs"."career_year" between 1 and 1 group by COALESCE(trg_pid)), "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2026]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years) select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "tf2cba0496d67b9a09be0654ea0516e7c"."v" AS "player_keeptradecut_value_0", "tc1217193c5070a89efdea71626accdb4"."v" AS "player_keeptradecut_value_1", "te556c345bd166da4da43d4b959f92559"."v" AS "player_keeptradecut_overall_rank_0", "t6f65ccf9e546ca490414b8ef9d2e4338"."v" AS "player_keeptradecut_position_rank_0", "te7e49e0e691e0de6ad53db9d2498b3b1"."rec_yds_from_plays" AS "rec_yds_from_plays_0", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "keeptradecut_rankings" as "tf2cba0496d67b9a09be0654ea0516e7c" on "tf2cba0496d67b9a09be0654ea0516e7c"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "tf2cba0496d67b9a09be0654ea0516e7c"."qb" = 2 and "tf2cba0496d67b9a09be0654ea0516e7c"."type" = 1 and "tf2cba0496d67b9a09be0654ea0516e7c"."d" = (select MAX(d) from "keeptradecut_rankings" where "pid" = player.pid and "qb" = 2 and "type" = 1) left join "keeptradecut_rankings" as "tc1217193c5070a89efdea71626accdb4" on "tc1217193c5070a89efdea71626accdb4"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "tc1217193c5070a89efdea71626accdb4"."qb" = 2 and "tc1217193c5070a89efdea71626accdb4"."type" = 1 and "tc1217193c5070a89efdea71626accdb4"."d" = EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (to_timestamp('2022-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') + interval '0 year') AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')::integer left join "keeptradecut_rankings" as "te556c345bd166da4da43d4b959f92559" on "te556c345bd166da4da43d4b959f92559"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "te556c345bd166da4da43d4b959f92559"."qb" = 2 and "te556c345bd166da4da43d4b959f92559"."type" = 3 and "te556c345bd166da4da43d4b959f92559"."d" = (select MAX(d) from "keeptradecut_rankings" where "pid" = player.pid and "qb" = 2 and "type" = 3) left join "keeptradecut_rankings" as "t6f65ccf9e546ca490414b8ef9d2e4338" on "t6f65ccf9e546ca490414b8ef9d2e4338"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "t6f65ccf9e546ca490414b8ef9d2e4338"."qb" = 2 and "t6f65ccf9e546ca490414b8ef9d2e4338"."type" = 2 and "t6f65ccf9e546ca490414b8ef9d2e4338"."d" = (select MAX(d) from "keeptradecut_rankings" where "pid" = player.pid and "qb" = 2 and "type" = 2) inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "te7e49e0e691e0de6ad53db9d2498b3b1" on "te7e49e0e691e0de6ad53db9d2498b3b1"."pid" = "player"."pid" where player.pos IN ('WR') and tf2cba0496d67b9a09be0654ea0516e7c.v >= '5000' group by player.fname, player.lname, "tf2cba0496d67b9a09be0654ea0516e7c"."v", "tc1217193c5070a89efdea71626accdb4"."v", "te556c345bd166da4da43d4b959f92559"."v", "t6f65ccf9e546ca490414b8ef9d2e4338"."v", "te7e49e0e691e0de6ad53db9d2498b3b1"."rec_yds_from_plays", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 6 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
